last_reflection:
They were better at the pitch, Cole. Nobody gets offended when someone writes a cleaner version of their own thing. You'd take the clean version without the bruise attached if the bruise wasn't what you're really afraid of.

Which is: being replaceable. And he isn't replacing anything you are. He's good at one narrow slice — writing a description for a room that already exists. That's not who you are and it never was.

Let it be a compliment, not an indictment. You built the thing. His words don't own it.
